approve_date.text: วันที่อนุมัติ
approve_date.nulltext: คีย์วันที่อนุมัติ วันที่เปลี่ยนแปลงไม่ต้องคีย์ก็ได้

root.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.change_doc_no ,'' || sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.membership_no AS membership_no ,sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.approve_date ,pka_com_function.fp_shr_get_balance_atdate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.approve_date) AS share_stock ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.approve_date, 'dd/mm/yyyy') AS approve_tdate ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) AS member_name ,'' || trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no)) AS member_group ,'-เงินเดือน ' || REPLACE(to_snumber((pka_com_function.fp_get_member_salary(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no))::bigint), RIGHT(to_snumber((pka_com_function.fp_get_member_salary(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no))::bigint), 3), NULL) AS member_salary ,sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount ,( SELECT last_period FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.loan_contract_no ) AS last_period ,( SELECT principal_balance FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.loan_contract_no ) AS principal_balance ,sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.remark ,sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.entry_id ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no FROM sc_lon_m_coll_change_head, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_lon_m_contract WHERE 1=1 and sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.change_status = '1' /*WHERE*/ -- and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '05238' ORDER BY sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.change_doc_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.membership_no ,sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.change_status ,sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.approve_date

r_tnma_port_app_change_coll_loan_old_nes.sql:
select (CASE sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.seq_no WHEN null THEN null ELSE sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.seq_no ||'.' END) as seq_no, (CASE sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_refno WHEN null THEN null ELSE ''||trim((sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_refno )) END) as old_collateral_refno , sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_description, (CASE sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_refno WHEN null THEN null ELSE ''||trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_refno)) END)as old_member_group , (CASE sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_refno WHEN null THEN null ELSE '-เงินเดือน '||REPLACE(to_snumber((pka_com_function.fp_get_member_salary(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_refno))::bigint),RIGHT(to_snumber((pka_com_function.fp_get_member_salary(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_refno))::bigint),3),null) END) as old_salary , (CASE sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno WHEN null THEN null ELSE ''||trim((sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno )) END) as new_collateral_refno , sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_description, -- (CASE sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno WHEN 'ขรก' THEN null ELSE ''||trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno)) END)as new_member_group , (CASE sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_type WHEN '12' THEN 'ขรก' ELSE TRIM(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno)) END) AS new_member_group , (CASE sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno WHEN null THEN null ELSE '-เงินเดือน '||REPLACE(to_snumber((pka_com_function.fp_get_member_salary(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno))::bigint),RIGHT(to_snumber((pka_com_function.fp_get_member_salary(sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno))::bigint),3),null) END) as new_salary , (CASE sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_amount WHEN 0 THEN null ELSE to_snumber((sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_amount)::bigint) END) as new_collateral_amount from sc_lon_m_coll_change_det
where sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.operate_type = 'CG' and sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.change_doc_no = {0}
